Walda Frey
Fair Walda
Alias Fair Walda[1]
Allegiance House Frey
Culture Rivermen
Born 280 AC or 281 AC[2]
Father Walton Frey
Mother Deana Hardyng
Books
  • A Clash of Kings (appendix)
  • A Storm of Swords (mentioned)
  • A Feast for Crows (appendix)

Walda Frey, better known as Fair Walda, is the daughter of Walton Frey and Deana Hardyng.[1] She is called Fair Walda as she is considered one of the more beautiful daughters of House Frey.[3]

Contents

  • 1 Appearance
  • 2 History
  • 3 Recent Events
    • 3.1 A Clash of Kings
    • 3.2 A Storm of Swords
  • 4 Family
  • 5 References

Appearance[ ]

Catelyn Stark considers Walda to be one of the more nubile Frey maidens.[3]

History[ ]

It is common knowledge around the Twins that Walda has occasionally slept with her first cousin, Black Walder.[4]

Recent Events[ ]

A Clash of Kings[ ]

When Lord Roose Bolton has to choose a bride from the maidens of House Frey, everyone is convinced he will choose Fair Walda.[3] When Lord Walder Frey offers Roose his bride's weight in silver as a dowry, Roose chooses Walda's cousin, Fat Walda, instead.[3][5]

A Storm of Swords[ ]

At the wedding feast of Lord Edmure Tully's and Lady Roslin Frey's wedding, Walda is seated between Robb Stark and Smalljon Umber.[3]
